A contract address hosts a smart contract, which is a set of code stored on the blockchain that runs when predetermined conditions are met. Learn more about addresses in our Knowledge Base.

Address QR Code
My Address - Private Name Tag or Note

My Name Tag:

Private Name Tags (up to 35 characters) can be used for easy identification of addresses

Private Note:

A private note (up to 500 characters) can be attached to this address.
Please DO NOT store any passwords or private keys here.

Compiler specific version warnings:
The compiled contract might be susceptible to the Solidity Compiler Bugs below:
  1. LostStorageArrayWriteOnSlotOverflow (low-severity)
  2. FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder (low-severity)
  3. MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess (low-severity)
  4. AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup (medium-severity)
  5. DirtyBytesArrayToStorage (low-severity)
  6. DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride (very low-severity)
  7. NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation (very low-severity)
  8. SignedImmutables (very low-severity)
  9. ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory (very low-severity)
  10. KeccakCaching (medium-severity)
  11. EmptyByteArrayCopy (medium-severity)
  12. DynamicArrayCleanup (medium-severity)
